title: Sylvara Session — 2026-03-13 (Production Deployment)
content:
# Session Digest — 2026-03-13

## What We Worked On
Full production deployment of Sylvara Scheduling App. Started the day with a deployed-but-broken app (Clerk dev instance rejecting cookies on Railway domain) and ended with a fully authenticated, live production app at scheduler.sylvara.app with real Iron Tree data.

Infrastructure work: registered sylvara.app on Cloudflare, configured DNS (5 Clerk CNAMEs + Railway CNAME via one-click), created Clerk production instance (cloned from dev), created Google OAuth credentials for production, swapped all env vars in Railway (pk_live / sk_live on both services).

Auth debugging: spent significant time diagnosing 401s on all proxy requests. Root cause chain: (1) CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS missing https:// prefix — red herring, proxy is server-side; (2) proxy was correctly forwarding tokens (confirmed via diagnostic logging); (3) API was rejecting tokens because DB user record had dev Clerk ID (user_3Aj3vFTEgCuwP7rO5bLXLQ9d3aV) not production ID (user_3Atot8ap7dPclReGp03vBbBtt5Y) — fixed via pgAdmin UPDATE; (4) publicMetadata missing role field — fixed by adding self-healing sync in jwt-auth.ts fallback resolver.

Webhook: wired up Clerk webhook for user.created. Discovered API had no route handler (404), auth prehandler was blocking webhooks, and raw body was being re-serialized (security finding). All fixed. Live test pending.

Code quality: ran comprehensive health check and full security audit (14 findings across Critical/High/Medium/Low). Fixed all HIGH and MEDIUM findings in 4 commits. Added diagnostic logging (later removed). Fixed nav hydration bug (isSignedIn gate causing nav to unmount on hard refresh). Added in-app role management Admin page (replaces promote-manager CLI script). Removed admin import page.

UI polish pass completed (14 files): Inter font via Google Fonts, nav shadow + active indicator, spacing bump across all pages, primary button shadows + hover states, status badge ring polish, table alternating rows + column header upgrade, empty states on dispatch board and backlog.

Comparable report investigation: weekly_backlog_snapshots table had data back to 2024-03-02 only. Historical Excel data (Back_Log_Report_Comparable.xlsm) parsed and backfilled via Python script. Multiple iterations required — first attempt stored crew-multiplied values (wrong), second attempt stored raw hours (correct, matching cron format). 2022 excluded (N/A in source). Final state: 642 records from 2019-01-05 to 2026-03-07. Cron runs every Saturday at 6am and will extend forward automatically.

Snapshot cron confirmed alive on Railway — registered at server startup, graceful shutdown on SIGTERM, deduplication by calendar day. No action needed.

Presentation packet created: 6-page branded PDF (Sylvara_Scheduler_Overview.pdf) covering Backlog, Dispatch Board, Reports, User Roles, What's Coming Next, and Getting Started. Written for non-technical audience (John, Eric, Larry Seely CFO, Savannah Sadowski).

Intro email sent by Cole to John Maestranzi, Eric Roensch, Savannah Sadowski, Larry Seely. Subject: "Introducing Sylvara Scheduler — scheduler.sylvara.app". PDF attached.

Vault restructure: brain files (sylvara.md, sylvara-architecture.md, sylvara-ops.md) and journal/sylvara/ directory created. Prompt sent to Code to execute vault maintenance tasks against C:\Obsidian\.

Demo moved from Friday to Monday.

## Decisions Made
- sylvara.app registered on Cloudflare [EXPLICIT]
- scheduler.sylvara.app is the web app subdomain; root sylvara.app reserved for future marketing site [EXPLICIT]
- Clerk production instance cloned from dev (preserves Google OAuth config) [EXPLICIT]
- Google OAuth: new production credentials created (Option B), not reusing dev client [EXPLICIT]
- In-app role management replaces CLI promote-manager script [EXPLICIT]
- Admin import page removed — dev tool, not for production users [EXPLICIT]
- Rate limiting deferred post-Monday (small closed user base, not urgent) [EXPLICIT]
- GET endpoint role restrictions: by design, all authenticated users have full read access — document don't fix [EXPLICIT]
- Inter chosen as app font for UI polish pass [EXPLICIT]
- Clerk Branding feature is paid tier — logo upload not available on free plan [EXPLICIT]
- weekly_backlog_snapshots backfill uses raw hours (scheduled + tbs, no crew multiplier) to match cron format [EXPLICIT]
- 2022 excluded from backfill — N/A in source Excel [EXPLICIT]
- Snapshot table nuked and reseeded clean rather than patching in place [EXPLICIT]

## Facts Learned
- Railway custom domain routing uses a separate internal hostname (ttdhturu.up.railway.app), not the public service URL — one-click Cloudflare connect handles this automatically [EXPLICIT]
- Clerk production instances require all 5 DNS CNAMEs before SSL issues [EXPLICIT]
- NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY is baked into the client bundle at build time — must trigger full rebuild after changing [EXPLICIT]
- Clerk test webhook events always 400 with real CLERK_WEBHOOK_SECRET — expected behavior, not a bug [EXPLICIT]
- Production Clerk user IDs differ from dev instance IDs — DB records must be updated when migrating [INFERRED]
- Self-healing publicMetadata sync in jwt-auth.ts fallback resolver fixes stale role metadata automatically on next API request [EXPLICIT]
- weekly_backlog_snapshots cron fires every Saturday 6am, registered at server startup on Railway, deduplicates by calendar day [EXPLICIT]
- weekly_backlog_snapshots rollup rows use sales_rep_code = NULL (not 'TOTAL') — cron and backfill must match [EXPLICIT]
- The comparable report chart plots total_hours directly (not crew_days). crew_days is a derived field in the API response only [EXPLICIT]
- Larry Seely is Iron Tree's CFO [EXPLICIT]
- Backlog Excel (Back_Log_Report_Comparable.xlsm) tracks On Board / TBS in raw hours (weeks of work), not crew-multiplied — matches cron format [EXPLICIT]

## Open Threads
- [ ] Monday demo prep: John and Eric sign in → webhook creates records → promote via Admin page
- [ ] Savannah account: sent link, waiting for her to sign in — needs Manager role when she does
- [ ] Live webhook test with throwaway Google account before Monday
- [ ] Security fixes: HIGH/MEDIUM findings sent to Code — confirm committed and deployed
- [ ] Toast notifications: primitives built, not yet wired up — post-demo
- [ ] Tier 2 UI refactor: deferred post-demo
- [ ] Rate limiting (@fastify/rate-limit): deferred post-Monday
- [ ] Vault restructure: Code prompt sent — confirm brain files created in C:\Obsidian\
- [ ] Two-AI review loop: plan.md and AGENTS.md changes need GPT-4 sign-off before applying
- [ ] Comparable report: total_dollars still null on all snapshot rows — cron doesn't write dollars, backfill doesn't have them. Acceptable for now but worth flagging.

## Related Projects
- Sylvara Scheduling App (primary)

## Keywords
sylvara, deployment, railway, clerk, auth, production, dns, security-audit, demo, comparable-report, backfill, snapshots, ui-polish, presentation
